ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the polling survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the polling survey */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the pollster conducting the survey */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sponsor of the survey */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample population surveyed */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population type surveyed */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the political party affiliation of the sample population */,
  "subject" TEXT /* The subject matter being polled */,
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the tracking status of the poll */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the poll's report or data file */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used for the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the poll results */,
  "data_collection_period" TEXT /* Detailed period for data collection */,
  "geographical_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical coverage of the poll */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the poll data */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the topic of the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_tracking_id FOREIGN KEY ("tracking_id") REFERENCES tracking ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the pollster's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the pollster */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the pollster */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the pollster was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the pollster's expertise and services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the sponsor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sponsor's activities and interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the poll this response pertains to */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question posed in the survey */,
  "very" INTEGER /* Number of responses indicating 'very concerned' */,
  "somewhat" INTEGER /* Number of responses indicating 'somewhat concerned' */,
  "not_very" INTEGER /* Number of responses indicating 'not very concerned' */,
  "not_at_all" INTEGER /* Number of responses indicating 'not at all concerned' */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific question */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "demographic_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store detailed demographic information of respondents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the poll */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the poll */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the topic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking status */,
  "tracking_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracking status */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tracking status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the poll associated with the URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL link to the dataset or report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the URL was added */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of what the URL links to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
